class.name: ResonanceProbeVolume
class.brief_description: Volume for baked reverb probes. Place in scenes and bake to sample room acoustics.
class.description:
ResonanceProbeVolume defines a 3D region where Steam Audio bakes reverb data. Probes are placed according to generation_type and spacing. Use Bake Probes in the viewport toolbar (when selected) to compute reflection data, then optionally Bake Pathing for multi-path propagation. Probe Data is stored in the probe_data resource.
Note: Deleting a probe volume that is still referenced by ResonancePlayer.pathing_probe_volume can trigger a Godot engine error: "node_path.cpp:272 - Condition "!p_np.is_absolute()" is true". References are auto-cleared on deletion; if the error persists, clear pathing_probe_volume manually before deleting (Project > Tools > Nexus Resonance > Unlink Probe Volume References).

method.name: bake_probes
method.description: Bakes reflection probes for this volume. Uses bake_config or Project Settings. Run from editor toolbar when volume is selected.

method.name: bake_probes_with_floor_points
method.description: Bakes probes at pre-computed floor raycast points. Call from worker thread; generate points via generate_probes_on_floor_raycast() on main thread.

method.name: generate_probes_on_floor_raycast
method.description: For Uniform Floor: raycast down onto collision geometry. Returns probe positions. Requires CollisionShape3D on floor. Must be called from main thread.

method.name: reload_probe_batch
method.description: Reloads probe data from the probe_data resource into the server. Call after pathing or static listener/source bake to apply updated data without restarting.

members.member: Per-volume bake configuration. When null, a default config is used. Assign a ResonanceBakeConfig for reflection type, pathing, static source/listener, and quality settings.
Resource storing baked probe data. Auto-created if empty. Save the scene after baking. Required for reverb at runtime.
Size of the probe volume in meters (X, Y, Z). Probes are placed inside this box.
Centroid = single probe at center. Uniform Floor = probes on horizontal plane. Volume = 3D grid filling the box.
Distance (meters) between probes. Smaller = more probes, higher quality, longer bake time.
Height (meters) of the probe plane for Uniform Floor mode. Ear height is typically 1.2–1.5.
Show probe spheres in the viewport when a ResonanceProbeVolume is selected. Purely visual; does not affect bake or runtime.
Scale of the probe sphere visualization in the editor. Does not affect bake or runtime.
Array of NodePaths to ResonancePlayer nodes to bake as Static Source. First valid entry is used. Configure Static Source in bake_config.
Array of NodePaths to ResonanceListener nodes to bake as Static Listener. First valid entry is used. Configure Static Listener in bake_config.
Influence radius (meters) for Static Source and Static Listener when the referenced node has no custom radius.
